description_en: Helsinki may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 115 halal restaurants and 10 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Helsinki, Finland, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Helsinki: 115+ halal restaurants, 10 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
